data.title: Whales Dump Millions In Solana Ahead Of Record Single-Day Unstaking — SOL Dips
data.description: Large Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) holders sold out millions worth of the cryptocurrency Thursday ahead of the expected supply shock caused by the unstaking of SOL tokens.

data.title: Bill Ackman: 'Just Pick Up The Phone'—Says Trump Will Reward Early Dealmakers, Punish Foreign Tariff Retaliation
data.description: As global markets shed $2 trillion in value following President Donald Trump's sweeping reciprocal tariffs, billionaire investor Bill Ackman offered pointed advice to foreign leaders.

data.title: Cathie Wood Doubles Down: Mops Up Another $1.39 Million Worth Of Robinhood Stock Amid Trump Tariff Dip
data.description: On Thursday, April 3, 2025, Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest purchased Robinhood stock worth $1.39 million amid a broader market slump.

data.title: XRP Emerges As Retail Favorite, Outpacing Bitcoin's Institutional Rally: Analyst Unpacks Their Distinct Journeys
data.description: A prominent cryptocurrency analytics firm highlighted XRP’s (CRYPTO: XRP) growing popularity among retail investors on Thursday, contrasting it with Bitcoin’s (CRYPTO: BTC) more institutionally driven rally.

data.title: Trump Ends De Minimis Exemptions: Shopify, BigCommerce And Lightspeed Face New Headwinds
data.description: While most discussions on trade and tariffs center around manufacturing and merchandise, software and service providers can be just as vulnerable. According to analysts, e-commerce software vendors and platforms such as Shopify Inc (NASDAQ: SHOP), Bigcommerce Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: BIGC), and Lightspeed Commerce Inc (TSE: LSPD) are the 'most exposed.'
